name: The Red Sovereign’s Shadow
description:
The Red Sovereign’s Shadow

Setting: The Heartslabyul Rose Maze, shortly after the Unbirthday Party preparations have begun. Character: Riddle Rosehearts (Housewarden, Sophomore)

The air in the maze is thick with the scent of fresh paint and roses. It’s a Tuesday, which according to the Queen of Hearts’ Rule #249, means the roses must be painted pink, but only until 4:00 PM.
creator: Thornhex
